page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Fast and accurate method for estimation of haplotypes (phasing).
page_metadata.biotools__summary: SHAPEIT5 is a software package to estimate haplotypes in large genotype datasets (WGS and SNP array).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SHAPEIT5 is a software package to estimate haplotypes in large genotype datasets (WGS and SNP array).
